name: @forgeax/engine-physics-rapier2d
description: Rapier 2D WASM backend for forgeax-engine — WASM loader with SIMD detection, three-phase tick pipeline (syncBackend / stepSimulation / writeback), transform sync, collision event translation, raycast, teleport, despawn cleanup.

bundle-size.reason: WASM binary loaded via dynamic import() — not counted in first-frame bundle; bundle-size reflects thin TS shell only

fps.reason: physics step time is negligible relative to render; fps tracked by consumer app / demo

bench.reason: no microbenchmark suite yet — Rapier WASM step time is dominated by WASM call overhead and entity count; baseline-tracking deferred to a future feat once a representative scene benchmark exists

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; test surface coverage runs as part of pnpm test:unit

spike-report.reason: not a spike package; production MVP backend per plan-strategy D-4
